title: AST Warrant Arrest: Fairbanks [AK25053371]
summary: On 6/3/2025 AST received a report of a male who would not leave the 7 Gables on Birch Ln. The person was identified as Oleg Khomich. Oleg had an active warrant (4DJ-25-0011CR) which was served on him. Oleg has been trespassed from 7 Gables and remanded to FCC for his warrant.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: Birch Ln

title: A Clear Message for Congress
summary: The Arctic Refuge isn’t just tundra and snow. It’s a place where thousands of caribou migrate each year to give birth. Where polar bears den, migratory birds from six continents rest their wings, and the Gwich’in people have lived in deep connection with the land for thousands of years. It’s sacred. It’s alive. And right now, it’s under threat. Recently, a coalition of organizations and businesses from across the country came together with a clear message for Congress: don’t trade the Arctic Refuge for a quick political win. Don’t sneak oil drilling into a budget bill. The climate can’t afford it. Wildlife can’t afford it. And the people who depend on this land for survival certainly can’t afford it. See the powerful letter below. Dear Members of Congress, As o...

title: AST Wildlife Violation: Nikiski [AK25052270]

title: Who is an Expert on Greenland?
summary: Responses to Trump’s Greenland bids in 2019 and 2014 highlight the inherent interdisciplinarity necessary for Greenlandic expertise. The post Who is an Expert on Greenland? appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: AST DUI: Meadow Lakes [AK25053033]
summary: On 6/2/2025 at approximately 2210 hours AST received a report of a vehicle driving erratically on Beverly Lakes Road. AST contacted the vehicle, and investigation revealed the driver Jerusha Redding (41) was impaired by controlled substances. She was remanded to Mat-Su Pretrial and released OR.

title: AST D.V Assault: Delta Junction [AK25052988]
summary: On 6/2/25 Delta Junction Troopers responded to a residence for a report of a DV assault in progress. On arrival Timofey Kolosov, 42, of Delta had left the area. He was contacted later and was placed under arrest.

title: Sophia Martinsen for Wrangell 4th of July Queen
summary: 16-year-old Sophia Martinsen is running for Wrangell 4 th of July Queen. As the only Royaly candidate this year, Sophia and her team will be working extra hard to provide Wrangell with the time-honored tradition of ‘queen food’ in Wrangell’s down-town area through the month of June.
